purpose: Define the evidence reduction rule that computes achieved fidelity level from receipts and gate posture.
computationRule: The achieved level is the highest level whose required evidence set is fully satisfied and whose required gates are all passed; if any required receipt or gate is blocked, the highest satisfied level is reduced to the last fully satisfied level.

mustSatisfy: equivalence proof for changed implementation exists

completionPosture: The reducer is the source of truth for how an achieved fidelity level is computed from evidence.
